description: Global CSS polish in frontend/src/index.css - add hover animations, gradients, transitions, badge improvements, and table striping plus sidebar active-state improvements
steps: In frontend/src/index.css, add a card hover animation that uses transform: translateY(-2px) with an increased box-shadow (shadow-lg) on .card:hover, keeping the existing transition duration at 200ms
Add a gentle gradient to .page-header using a subtle background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-light), transparent) with appropriate padding and border-radius
Improve .btn styles by adding subtle background gradients - .btn-primary gets a linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-dark)), .btn-success gets a gradient variant, etc.
Add transition: all 0.2s ease to all interactive elements via a shared rule: .btn, .card, .badge, .form-input, a { transition: all 0.2s ease; }
Improve .badge styles to be pill-shaped (border-radius: 20px), slightly larger padding (3px 10px), and add subtle box-shadow on colored badges
Add subtle zebra striping to table rows - tbody tr:nth-child(even) with a slightly more visible striped pattern and a left-border-color indicator
Improve the sidebar active NavLink styling in the CSS: the .sidebar a with border-left should have a brighter, thicker (4px) left border and a more visible background highlight
Add section header separators in the sidebar - the section divider styling with a subtle line + spacing
Ensure sidebar nav icons get slightly larger treatment (add font-size bump to 18px for nav item icons within the sidebar context via inline style updates in App.tsx)
Add dark mode variants for the new hover/gradient styles
acceptance_criteria: npm run build succeeds with no TypeScript or Vite errors
Cards have a translateY(-2px) hover effect with increased shadow
Page headers have a subtle gradient background
All interactive elements have 0.2s ease transitions
Badges are pill-shaped with better colors
Table rows have subtle striped patterns
Sidebar active items have bright 4px left border and background highlight
Dark mode still works correctly for all new styles
